---
title: "CV"
---

<style>
.cv-embed {
  width: 100%;
  height: 900px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}
</style>

<p>
  <a href="files/CV_Joel_Ardiaca.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open CV in PDF</a>
</p>

<iframe
  class="cv-embed"
  src="files/CV_Joel_Ardiaca.pdf"
  title="CV PDF preview">
</iframe>
